rationale: Changed the mobile route nav from fixed top offset to absolute positioning anchored below the masthead with top: 100%.
Reworked mobile navigation CSS variables to derive from existing theme tokens and added dark theme overrides.
Updated the Mission Control CSS structure test to assert absolute positioning and top: 100%.
Top-level review summary is covered by the CSS positioning and token-first theme fixes.
Added max-height and overflow-y:auto to keep the mobile top-sheet scrollable on constrained viewport heights.
Automated review metadata only; the actionable child comment was addressed separately.
